sentences.english: I ride my bike to the park every Sunday.
sentences.korean: 매주 일요일 자전거를 타고 공원에 가요.

sentences.english: The park has a long path along the river.
sentences.korean: 공원에 강을 따라 긴 길이 있어요.

sentences.english: I ride for about forty minutes and then take a rest on a bench.
I always bring water and a small snack.
Riding my bike makes me feel free and happy.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
